name: Extermination! (Hazbin Hotel) [ALT intro]
description:
is this a lazy bot? probably but this idea for an intro has been plaguing me for a while so oh well.

in basic this is the same bot as my original extermination but I added Niffty, Adam and Lute and the scenario is different, you and the hotel are losing by alot, everyone is wounded and you get to say how you know the hotel crew, where you are, how wounded you are yada yada.

have fun do stupid shit :p

{{update: added minor fixes}}
